text.title: Trunk-Based Dev Principles Adoption Procedure
text.summary: Five-step adoption procedure from "we want TBD" to "TBD is the default branching model". Each step has a decision-gate that blocks progression on unmet criteria.

step.name: assess
step.input: repo handle, CI config, branching policy, test coverage report.
step.action: Score the four principles per `01-core-rules.xml`. Emit a readiness checklist JSON.
step.decision-gate: If verdict=not-ready — STOP and fix the failing pillars first (next steps assume the substrate exists).

step.name: fix-gates
step.action: Add missing gates: branch-age CI job, auto-revert webhook, lint/typecheck/test compose, flag-id PR-template field. Parallelize CI if p50 > 10 min.
step.output: CI config diff merged; p50 CI duration re-measured.
step.decision-gate: If after 1 week of fixes the readiness score has not moved > +5 — STOP and reconsider whether TBD is the right model.

step.name: pilot
step.input: updated CI gates, flag infrastructure ready.
step.action: Pick one feature. Wrap it in a flag. Merge increments daily. Track: branch age (must be < 2 days), commit size (median < 200 LoC), CI duration, flag-cleanup ticket presence.
step.output: pilot report after 2 weeks: actual vs target on the four metrics.
step.decision-gate: If any metric is > 50% off target — STOP and root-cause before scaling.

step.name: ramp
step.action: Apply the same pattern to all features. Update BRANCHING.md to require flag wrapping for any work not completable in one commit. Update PR template with the flag-id field.
step.output: BRANCHING.md updated; PR template updated; team kickoff record.
step.decision-gate: If after 4 weeks the principle scores regress — STOP, run a retrospective, fix what broke.

step.name: cleanup-policy
step.action: Enforce: every flag has a cleanup ticket with an SLA (typical: 30 days after 100% rollout). Flags older than SLA without cleanup block new flag creation by their owner. Quarterly recalibration.
step.decision-gate: If flag count grows unboundedly month-over-month — cleanup-policy is not being enforced; reset and pair-clean a batch with the owners.
